title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Prevention of Black marketing and Maintenance of Supplies of Essential Commodities Act, 1980. (2) It extends to the whole of India 1***. (3) It shall be deemed to have come into force on the 15th day of October, 1979.
footnote: 1. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 34 of 2019, s. 95 and the Fifth Schedule (w.e.f. 31-10-2019).
